remember: Students will be able to recall and list the various forms of social justice, such as distributive justice and corrective justice.
Students will be able to identify and explain the concept of social justice and its importance in a democratic society.
Students will be able to recall the key features of social justice, such as equality, fairness, and human rights.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of social justice and its relationship with human rights and equality.
Students will be able to analyze the role of social justice in promoting the well-being of marginalized communities.
Students will be able to understand the challenges and complexities of achieving social justice in a diverse and unequal society.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of social justice to real-world scenarios, such as evaluating policies and programs that affect marginalized communities.
Students will be able to use critical thinking to resolve moral and ethical dilemmas related to social justice.
Students will be able to design and implement strategies for promoting social justice and human rights.
analyze: Students will be able to critically analyze the impact of social injustice on individuals and society, such as poverty, inequality, and human rights violations.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different approaches to achieving social justice, such as government policies, activism, and education.
Students will be able to identify and challenge dominant ideologies and power structures that perpetuate social injustice.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of social justice and its importance in a democratic society.
Describe the forms of social justice, such as distributive justice and corrective justice.
Discuss the role of social justice in promoting the well-being of marginalized communities.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of social justice and its relationship with human rights and equality.
Analyze the impact of social injustice on individuals and society.
Evaluate the effectiveness of different approaches to achieving social justice.
